seo.h1: Column Buckling Calculator & Engineering Guide - AluCalc
seo.intro: Calculates the axial load limit before lateral instability occurs.
seo.step_by_step:
1. Define system parameters for Column Buckling.
2. Consult the technical reference table for material constants.
3. Apply the AISI S100 formula.
4. Run the post-calculation design checks.
seo.practical: In Structures applications, accurate Column Buckling analysis is vital for safety and performance.
